---
title: "payload.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\payload.py"
loc: 35
complexity: 4
logic_score: 8.60
style_score: 3.49
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.96
---

## Intent
The `payload.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on IntentPayload, __post_init__, __repr__, to_dict. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via IntentPayload, __post_init__, __repr__, to_dict. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [dataclasses](file://dataclasses)
- [types](file://types)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `IntentPayload`
- `__post_init__`
- `__repr__`
- `to_dict`
